overall.description: Gameplay footage from Black Myth: Wukong showing the player character walking through a snowy mountain temple environment. The character exits a cave with guardian statues, passes a massive Buddha statue, and traverses a stone bridge with ornate railings. The scene features high-fidelity winter lighting and ancient Asian stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: cave interior with four guardian statues

events.description: character begins walking forward from the cave interior toward the exit

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cave entrance toward the snowy exterior

entered.detail: Rocky cave entrance framing the bright snowy exterior beyond
Four massive stone guardian statues standing in a row at the back of the cave
Rough textured stone walls of the cave interior

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a dimly lit cave where the character stands before four imposing guardian statues. The camera follows the character as they begin walking toward the cave entrance, with rocky walls visible on both sides and snow covering the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley with ancient stone pagodas

events.description: exits the cave into the open snowy mountain valley
moving from cave shadow into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy path between rock formations and ancient stone structures

entered.detail: Multi-tiered ancient stone pagoda rising in the distance
Tall stone wall with intricate ancient carvings and reliefs
Sparse trees covered in snow on the left hillside

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the cave into a sunlit snowy valley. A stone pagoda becomes visible in the distance while carved stone walls line the right side of the path. Snow-covered trees dot the left hillside as the character walks through the ancient mountain sanctuary.

scene_state.functional_zone: massive Buddha statue sanctuary in snowy mountains

events.description: the massive standing Buddha statue comes into view on the left side
character pauses briefly to look up at the giant Buddha statue

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the massive Buddha statue, occasionally gazing up at its scale and detail

entered.detail: Colossal standing Buddha statue carved into the mountain cliff, wearing red robes
Traditional stone lantern structure on the right side of the path
Frozen waterfall cascading down the distant mountain cliff

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast sanctuary dominated by a colossal standing Buddha statue carved into the mountain. The character walks along the base of the statue, passing stone lanterns and frozen waterfalls. The scale of the Buddha becomes more imposing as the character approaches and walks alongside it.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge with ornate railings overlooking mountain vista

events.description: passing the Buddha statue and stepping onto the elevated stone bridge
slight turn to the left while walking along the bridge path

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated stone bridge with ornate railings toward the distant mountain vista

entered.detail: Ornate stone railings with decorative posts lining the bridge
Ancient temple structures visible atop the distant snow-covered peaks

segments.scene_description: Having passed the massive Buddha, the character walks along an elevated stone bridge with ornate railings on both sides. The path leads toward a breathtaking mountain vista with distant temple structures visible atop snow-covered peaks. The ground transitions to stone pavement as the character moves toward the open mountain range.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim confines of a rocky cave into a vast, sunlit mountain sanctuary. It begins inside a dimly lit cavern where the character passes four imposing guardian statues, moving forward as the rocky walls give way to a bright, snowy valley. As the character emerges into the light, the scene expands to reveal a distant stone pagoda and snow-covered trees before shifting toward a colossal standing Buddha statue carved directly into the mountain. The camera then tracks the character along the base of this massive figure, passing frozen waterfalls and stone lanterns, before transitioning onto an elevated stone bridge with ornate railings. Finally, the path opens up to a breathtaking vista of distant temple structures perched atop snow-covered peaks under a clear winter sky.
